# Ministry & Mission Platform — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-ministry-mission-ministry-mission-platform
**Vertical slug:** ministry-mission
**VN-ID:** VN-CIV-003
**Niche family:** NF-CIV-REL (variant of church anchor — P2 SHIPPED)
**Family role:** variant
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria has one of the world's most active mission and ministry landscapes — from the global megachurches (RCCG has 40,000+ parishes worldwide) to Islamic mission organisations (Jama'atu Nasril Islam, Izala), inter-denominational mission agencies (SIM Nigeria, African Inland Mission), and independent apostolic ministries. Mission-specific needs differ from local church sites: emphasis on outreach campaigns, evangelical rallies, prayer conferences, global partnerships, media ministry (TV/radio), missionary support funds, and salvation statistics. CAC registration under Companies and Allied Matters Act (Part F: Incorporated Trustees) is mandatory. NDPR applies to donor and counsellor contact data. Key income: tithes, offerings, international mission partnerships, merchandise, media subscription.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Rev Emeka Obiora, Mission Director, Onitsha** — Runs an apostolic outreach ministry. Needs site for crusade schedules, testimonies, and supporter donations.
- **Hajiya Amina Sule, Islamic Da'wah Coordinator, Kaduna** — Islamic outreach mission. Needs Arabic/English content schedule and volunteer registration.
- **Mrs Grace Afolabi, Prayer Ministry Leader, Lagos** — Hosts international prayer conferences. Needs event calendar and live stream link.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Ministry branding, upcoming crusade/outreach dates, mission statement, WhatsApp prayer/enquiry CTA, media highlights
- **About**: Founder biography, church denomination affiliation, CAC registration, mission territories, global partnerships
- **Programmes**: Events and crusade calendar, prayer meetings, media ministry (radio/TV), sermon archive, mission fund details
- **Contact**: WhatsApp prayer line, salvation/counselling form (NDPR), address, prayer request submission

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Faithful, bold, warm — echoing Nigerian pentecostal and evangelical communication styles. Scripture references appropriate. Taglines: "Bringing the Gospel to Every Nation", "Light for Nigeria, Light for the World". Primary CTA: "Connect with Us (WhatsApp)". Secondary CTA: "Our Outreach Calendar". AVOID: overly commercial tone; keep the spiritual mission central.

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- CAC Incorporated Trustees registration number
- Denominational affiliation (RCCG, CAN, PFN, JNI as applicable)
- CAN (Christian Association of Nigeria) membership
- Founder/General Overseer credentials and ordination
- Media presence (TV channel number, radio station)
- Mission territories map (states and countries reached)
- Partner ministry logos
- Bank account details for offerings (Nigerian banks — not PayPal)

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Large outdoor crusade ground at night — thousands of Nigerians with raised hands, stage lit dramatically
2. Pastor in traditional agbada or collar suit praying with a congregation at a Nigerian indoor church
3. Mission team distributing Bibles or food items in a rural Borno/Adamawa community
4. Islamic da'wah table at a mosque entrance in Kano — literature and volunteers visible
5. Women's prayer group in a church hall — Nigerian women kneeling, some in church uniforms
6. Founder portrait: Nigerian clergy in robes/bishop attire with a professional studio backdrop
7. Outdoor street evangelism: young Nigerian youths with PA system on a busy Lagos street

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- CAC Part F (Incorporated Trustees) registration number
- CAN/JNI/denominational body membership (as applicable)
- NDPR for counsellor and prayer request data (sensitive category)
- Financial transparency: how donations are used (brief statement)
- EFCC: no solicitation language that implies guaranteed financial returns (prophetic prosperity claims)
- Foreign mission partnerships: SCUML registration if receiving international funds

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- WhatsApp prayer/enquiry CTA on home + contact ✅
- All offerings/donations in NGN ✅
- Nigerian cities and mission territories ✅
- Nigerian names for pastors, founders, team ✅
- CAC/CAN trust signals ✅
- Bank transfer / Paystack for offerings ✅
- 375px mobile responsive ✅
- esc() on all user strings ✅
- NDPR consent on prayer/counselling form ✅
